title: Junior Revenue Manager at Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises:
Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises!
